sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Genoa has struggled in their last 5 matches, failing to secure a win with 3 losses and 2 draws, conceding goals consistently. Atalanta, on the other hand, is in excellent form with 4 wins and 1 draw in their last 5 matches, scoring 10 goals and showing strong attacking prowess.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Atalanta has dominated recent encounters with Genoa, winning 3 of the last 5 matchups, including a convincing 5-1 victory in their most recent clash. Genoa has failed to keep a clean sheet in their last 3 head-to-head matches against Atalanta.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Atalanta sits 3rd in the league with 73 goals scored, showcasing their attacking strength, while Genoa, in 13th, has scored only 32 goals and struggles with possession and creating big chances. Atalanta's defense is also more solid, conceding fewer goals compared to Genoa's 45.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Atalanta's Mateo Retegui, with 24 goals and a high Sofascore rating, poses a significant threat. Genoa misses key players like Fabio Miretti, which could impact their midfield stability, while Atalanta has fewer significant absences.
